scripts.start: npm run build && cross-env NODE_ENV=production node dist/server.js
scripts.dev: npm run build && cross-env NODE_ENV=development node dist/server.js
scripts.db:migrate: npm run build && sequelize-cli db:migrate --config dist/config/sequelizeCliConfig.js --migrations-path dist/migrations
scripts.db:migrate:undo: npm run build && sequelize-cli db:migrate:undo --config dist/config/sequelizeCliConfig.js --migrations-path dist/migrations
scripts.db:migrate:status: npm run build && sequelize-cli db:migrate:status --config dist/config/sequelizeCliConfig.js --migrations-path dist/migrations
